attributes.name: To-Do Item Card
attributes.summary: The Todo definition provides a comprehensive data structure and presentation for task management within a card-based interface. It models key task attributes such as title, description, status (To Do, In Progress, Done), priority (Low, Medium, High), due date, and completion status. It offers multiple embedded and isolated views designed to adapt to various display contexts, including card, strip, tile, badge, and compact formats. The component includes dynamic styling based on task status and priority, as well as calculated fields for labels and classes, enabling consistent visual cues across different layouts. Its primary purpose is to facilitate rich, adaptable task tracking and management within a card-centric application.
